table.name: antikvariaty
table.comment: data from muj-antikvariat.cz, used for record enrichment

table.name: antikvariaty_catids
table.comment: extracted identifiers from antikvariaty records. These are used for mapping to real records.

table.name: authority_record
table.comment: table holding authority records information

table.name: cnb
table.comment: dedup_keys: table contatining CNBs

table.name: cosmotron_996
table.comment: records from cosmotron, used for periodicals

table.name: dedup_record
table.comment: represents one deduplicated record which consists of one or more harvested records

table.name: format
table.comment: represents possible formats of harvested records (MARC, DC ..)

table.name: fulltext_kramerius
table.comment: harvested OCRs from digital libraries, page by page. REDUNDANT DATA, CONSIDER NORMALIZATION ???

table.name: harvested_record
table.comment: basic table, contains full records in raw form

table.name: harvested_record_format
table.comment: represents all possible physical formats of record

table.name: harvested_record_format_link
table.comment: link table

table.name: import_conf
table.comment: configuration of record sources

table.name: isbn
table.comment: dedup_keys: table contatining ISBNs

table.name: ismn
table.comment: dedup_keys: table contatining ISMNs

table.name: issn
table.comment: dedup_keys: table contatining ISSNs

table.name: kramerius_conf
table.comment: extension of import_conf for Kramerius

table.name: oai_harvest_conf
table.comment: extension of import_conf for OAI

table.name: obalkyknih_toc
table.comment: downloaded table of contents from obalkyknih.cz

table.name: oclc
table.comment: dedup_keys: table contatining OCLCs

table.name: recordmanager_key
table.comment: source of ids, used by Hibernate

table.name: sigla
table.comment: information about siglas(unique identifiers of libraries) for import configurations. MOVE TO IMPORT_CONF TABLE ???

table.name: skat_keys
table.comment: dedup_keys: extracted identifiers of merged records from SKAT

column.name: updated
column.comment: timestamp of last change

column.name: harvested_record_id
column.comment: link to record

column.name: uuid_page
column.comment: UUID of page

column.name: is_private
column.comment: is this fulltext publicly available?

column.name: order_in_document
column.comment: sequential order of page in record

column.name: page
column.comment: string notation of page

column.name: fulltext
column.comment: raw OCR

column.name: id
column.comment: unique artificial record identifier

column.name: import_conf_id
column.comment: source of record

column.name: record_id
column.comment: identifier of record, unique in source

column.name: raw_001_id
column.comment: raw conent of 001 MARC field

column.name: harvested
column.comment: timestamp of first record obtaining

column.name: updated
column.comment: timestamp of last record change from source

column.name: deleted
column.comment: timestamp of record deletion from source

column.name: oai_timestamp
column.comment: raw timestamp from OAI protocol

column.name: format
column.comment: indicator format used for storing of raw_record

column.name: dedup_record_id
column.comment: dedup_record assigned to this record

column.name: publication_year
column.comment: dedup_key: year of publication

column.name: author_auth_key
column.comment: dedup_key: authority key of main author

column.name: author_string
column.comment: dedup_key: normalized name of main author

column.name: issn_series
column.comment: dedup_key: serie of issn

column.name: issn_series_order
column.comment: dedup_key: order of issn series

column.name: uuid
column.comment: UUID of record

column.name: scale
column.comment: dedup_key: scale, for maps only

column.name: weight
column.comment: estimated weight of record based on record quality

column.name: cluster_id
column.comment: dedup_key: id for cluster deduplication, used for selected sources

column.name: pages
column.comment: dedup_key: count of pages

column.name: dedup_keys_hash
column.comment: SHA-1 hash of all dedup keys of record

column.name: next_dedup_flag
column.comment: indicator whether this record should be deduplicated in next deduplication process

column.name: raw_record
column.comment: raw record data in given format

column.name: id_prefix
column.comment: prefix of source institution, used in SOLR as prefix of identifier

column.name: base_weight
column.comment: base weight for records from this source

column.name: cluster_id_enabled
column.comment: indicator whether cluster_id deduplication should be used for this source

column.name: filtering_enabled
column.comment: indicator whether additional filters for records from this source

column.name: interception_enabled
column.comment: indicator whether intercepting (intensional changes in records) should be applied for this source

column.name: is_library
column.comment: indicator whether this source is library or different type of institution. MOVE TO LIBRARY TABLE ???

column.name: harvest_frequency
column.comment: frequency of harvesting during automatic updates

column.name: url
column.comment: url of Kramerius API endpoint

column.name: url_solr
column.comment: url of Kramerius SOLR (used in specific cases when access to SOLR is granted by Kramerius owner)

column.name: query_rows
column.comment: number of result rows requested from API, high numbers may cause latency problems

column.name: metadata_stream
column.comment: type of metadata harvested from Kramerius

column.name: auth_token
column.comment: Base64 token created from username and password provided by Kramerius owner to access private documents

column.name: fulltext_harvest_type
column.comment: [fedora|solr], fedora is default type, should work for most institutions

column.name: download_private_fulltexts
column.comment: decides whether fulltexts should be harvested from private documents, auth_token is needed if true

column.name: url
column.comment: URL of OAI provider

column.name: set_spec
column.comment: OAI set

column.name: skat_record_id
column.comment: identifier of SKAT record

column.name: sigla
column.comment: sigla of local local record

column.name: local_record_id
column.comment: identifier of local record

column.name: manually_merged
column.comment: indicator, whether source SKAT record was manually checked by librarian
